name: File Reader
description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem given its path. Supports text files like .txt, .py, .json, .md, and more.

name: File Writer
description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file on the local filesystem with the provided text content.

name: Directory Manager
description: List directory contents, create new folders, delete directories, and navigate the local filesystem tree.

name: Web Page Fetcher
description: Fetch the raw HTML or text content of a web page given its URL. Useful for scraping, reading documentation, or downloading page data.

name: Web Search Engine
description: Search the internet for current information, news articles, and web results using a query string. Returns titles, snippets, and links.

name: System Info Reporter
description: Retrieve local system information such as OS name, CPU usage, memory stats, disk space, and running processes.

name: HTTP Request Client
description: Send HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) to any URL with custom headers and body. Returns the response status code, headers, and body.

name: API Request Builder
description: Construct and send authenticated API requests with query parameters, JSON payloads, and bearer token headers for REST API integrations.

name: JSON Parser
description: Parse a raw JSON string into a structured object, validate JSON syntax, and extract nested values using dot-notation paths like 'user.address.city'.

name: JSON Transformer
description: Transform JSON data by filtering keys, flattening nested structures, merging multiple JSON objects, and converting between JSON and CSV formats.

name: Python Code Executor
description: Execute a snippet of Python code in a sandboxed environment and return the standard output, errors, and return value.

name: Date and Time Utilities
description: Get the current date and time, convert between time zones, calculate differences between two dates, and format timestamps into human-readable strings.

name: Calendar Event Manager
description: Create, list, update, and delete calendar events. Set reminders, check availability, and manage recurring schedules.

name: Text Summarizer
description: Summarize long passages of text into concise bullet points or short paragraphs. Useful for condensing articles, documents, and notes.

name: Regex Text Processor
description: Apply regular expression patterns to search, match, replace, and extract substrings from text. Supports common regex operations and pattern testing.
